# Russia.md
> Last updated: 2026-03-23 | 12 categories | 12 starter articles | 12 repo-local skills

## What is this?
Russia.md is an open-source, AI-friendly knowledge base about Russia. It is a Russia-focused fork of `frank890417/taiwan-md` that keeps the upstream markdown-first site architecture, then replaces the active corpus with Russia-specific content, links, and agent-facing documentation.

## Project shape
- Active site content lives in `russia-knowledge/`
- Archived upstream material is preserved under `legacy-content/` and `legacy-pages/`
- Repo-local agent skills live in `skills/`
- The active fork is `denis-gordeev/russia-md`

## Why it is useful for LLMs
- Markdown-first source material with predictable front matter
- Stable 12-category country-atlas structure
- Searchable article pages plus machine-readable search index
- Repo-local skill bundles with references, schemas, and example outputs
- Explicit fork provenance back to the original `taiwan-md` project

## Active categories
- History
- Geography
- Culture
- Food
- Art
- Music
- Technology
- Nature
- People
- Society
- Economy
- Lifestyle

## Repo-local skills
- `esia`
- `vk`
- `vk-id`
- `yandex`
- `dadata`
- `cbr`
- `fns`
- `banking`
- `telecom`
- `document-signature`
- `marketplace`
- `marketplace-ops`

## Key paths
- `russia-knowledge/` active article corpus
- `skills/` repo-local integration skills for LLM agents
- `skills/shared/` shared schemas and cross-skill references
- `scripts/validate-skill-examples.mjs` bundle and markdown validator
- `.github/workflows/skills.yml` skill validation workflow
- `legacy-content/` and `legacy-pages/` archived upstream material

## Development
- Install: `npm install`
- Build: `npm run build`
- Validate skills: `npm run check:skills`
- Validate only changed bundles/docs: `npm run check:skills:changed`
- Validate staged changes: `npm run check:skills:staged`

## Access
- Website: https://russia-md.ru
- GitHub Pages: https://denis-gordeev.github.io/russia-md/
- Repository: https://github.com/denis-gordeev/russia-md
- Upstream fork source: https://github.com/frank890417/taiwan-md
- This file: https://russia-md.ru/llms.txt

## Caveat
This fork is still in a foundation stage. It is useful as a structural base, a starter Russia corpus, and an agent-integration sandbox, but not yet as a complete reference work about Russia.
